Error.CannotMove: Cannot move NPCs that are already moving!
Config.NotifyMovements_Description: If enabled, any changes to an NPC's position will be logged to your SMAPI console so that you are aware of any position changes.
Config.SkipWalkingNpcs_Description: If enabled, this mod will not alter the positions of NPCs that are set up to walk around the festival. Disabling this may lead to some NPCs behaving or pathfinding weirdly.
Config.MoveNpcKey_Description: The hotkey you must press in order to begin manually moving an NPC.
Config.PrecisionModKey_Description: When held while manually moving an NPC, you can precisely position them instead of having them snap to the world grid.
